text: The Philosophical Aspect and Existence of TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid towards the Islamic Boarding School Education with Reference to Its Relevance to the National Education System in Indonesia The objective of this study was to discover the philosophical aspect and existence of TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid towards the Islamic boarding school education. In this respect, the study aimed to explore his ideas and the relevance towards the present-day national education system in Indonesia. The method used in this study was qualitative descriptive with a descriptive approach. The results of the study revealed that TGKH M Zainuddin Abdul Madjid contributed successfully towards transforming the educational system in Lombok so that the people there can gain more understanding on the basics of Islam and at the same time achieve a more functional Islamic educational institution. This was evidently made possible by the integration of pedagogical concept and practices implemented by the reformist ulama on the surface of which there was a learning process to strengthen the Islamic faith in students and to institutionalise religious educational instruction as a part of the national education system in Indonesia.
